evaluations.short_rationale: The candidate perfectly preserves the ephemeral whiteboard core while providing highly concrete MVP boundaries, such as user limits and specific tools, translating the reference into a highly feasible test.

The transformation removes vague AI analytics in favor of testable, manual keyword extraction. It sacrifices some automated novelty for a highly feasible and bounded prototype, successfully trading complex algorithms for practical execution.

The transformation wisely strips away highly complex computer vision algorithms, opting for a feasible visual overlay comparison. This improves testability while retaining the core educational goal, accepting a moderate mechanism change.

The transformation preserves the dynamic module-swapping combat while effectively bounding the scope by removing procedural generation. Limiting the prototype to five specific, testable modules significantly improves feasibility.

By narrowing a full subscription service to a single, testable kit, the transformation provides a much more practical MVP. It bounds the scope beautifully while fully preserving the educational flavor-discovery core.

The candidate successfully scopes the game down to a tutorial and single stage, avoiding complex AI or intricate puzzles, while completely preserving the distinctive gravity-manipulation mechanic for a practical, focused prototype.

The transformation replaces the grandiose claim of near-infinite procedural generation with a highly feasible, bounded logic grid generator using a small pool of archetypal elements, perfectly trading overclaims for a testable prototype.

The transformation achieves feasibility by completely abandoning the distinctive empathetic and emotional intelligence aspects of the reference. It results in a conventional language chatbot, losing the core premise in the pursuit of simplicity.

The transformation bounds the MVP perfectly by maintaining the dynamic JavaScript injection but dropping complex location-based targeting, ensuring a highly testable first iteration without losing the core premise.
The candidate replaces complex AI with a structured rule-based system for free-body diagrams, greatly improving testability while still preserving the visual deconstruction core of the original.

The candidate drops the core code-history analysis mechanism for generic keyword matching. While highly feasible, it abandons the distinctive leap entirely, making the original reference much more compelling to prototype.
The transformation sets clear limits on quiz size and template count while perfectly preserving the micro-learning core, establishing a highly credible MVP boundary.
By dropping complex AI and grocery delivery for a rule-based MVP, the transformation prioritizes safety and feasibility while remaining true to the personalized allergy-aware meal planning mechanism.
The transformation simplifies complex 3D polyrhythms into a 2D 4/4 tap game. It loses some distinctive novelty but gains immense practical testability for a rhythm-based training tool MVP.
The candidate removes complex geospatial and automated point systems in favor of a manual, moderated board, retaining the core local exchange while dramatically lowering the implementation barrier.
The transformation elegantly bounds the clone mechanic to a limited sequence of inputs and echo types, vastly improving technical feasibility without losing the unique temporal combat core.
The candidate clarifies the operational scope for a short-term test, specifying duration and tools, while fully maintaining the residency concept and core distinctive mechanism.

The transformation replaces deep AI synthesis with manual tags and basic keyword extraction, successfully trading overambitious automated insight for a practical, buildable peer interpretation platform.
Restricting sourcing to known urban farms instead of pure generalized foraging makes the dining experience safe and practical to execute, while strongly preserving the hyper-local narrative.
The transformation beautifully bounds the scope with explicit limits on pages and pre-designed assets, making the collaborative digital story builder concrete and testable.
Replaces complex open-world terrain algorithms and emergent AI with a localized, controlled deformation test, successfully retaining the erosive core mechanic in a highly buildable state.
The candidate drops dynamic queueing and automated leaderboards for a single-location test with basic photo verification, bounding the real-world quest MVP perfectly.

The transformation removes the unrealistic renewable on-demand roasting claim in favor of a standard small-batch partnership, creating a highly feasible manual curation test that retains the surprise discovery.
By replacing automatic multi-frame extraction with manual single-frame selection, the transformation sacrifices some automation for a highly testable, focused visual guide generator.
The candidate utilizes accessible technology like color bulbs and essential oils over advanced custom diffusion systems to test the multi-sensory dining hypothesis safely and affordably.
Using pre-recorded audio responses to pre-written Yes/No questions explicitly bounds the narrative tree, ensuring the core diagnostic process is entirely testable without complex logic engines.
The transformation drops predictive AI and automated e-commerce fulfillment for a simple threshold alert system, vastly improving MVP feasibility while addressing the core supply problem.
The candidate removes highly complex dynamic object recognition in favor of static AR overlays for pouring angles, effectively bounding the scope while testing the core visual guidance value.

The transformation replaces complex biological light sources with accessible UV and LED equivalents. While the 'bioluminescent' core is lost, it creates a viable test for the calming ambient atmosphere.
Replaces complex authentic tools with simplified approximations to maintain cultural immersion while controlling costs, providing a concrete plan for sourcing and building 50 limited-edition boxes.
The transformation shifts from an AI-assisted cloud platform to a local encrypted desktop app, drastically simplifying security and development for the MVP while retaining the curation core.
The candidate perfectly operationalizes the narrative sandbox by setting concrete constraints on turn length, player count, and voting frequency, keeping the core highly recognizable.
The transformation replaces complex procedural music generation with a single fixed track, focusing entirely on validating the rhythmic input mechanic and combo multiplier effectively.
The candidate swaps generalized surface detection for reliable printed QR markers, ensuring the AR puzzle mechanic functions smoothly for early testing without sacrificing the historical premise.
The transformation removes complex ML visual analysis, relying on explicit user categorization and manual curation from specific marketplaces to test the core feed value proposition affordably.
